name: sardine
description: GPU-accelerated SAR browser viewer with STAC catalog and file serving

default.description: Node.js stdio MCP server — bridges viewer HTTP endpoints (4 tools)

skills.name: sardine_viewer_stac_search
skills.description: Search local DuckDB STAC catalog for SAR scenes

skills.name: sardine_viewer_list_files
skills.description: List SAR data files from the viewer's data directory
skills.returns: Array of file entries with name, size, type

skills.name: sardine_viewer_serve_file
skills.description: Serve a local HDF5/GeoTIFF file via HTTP Range requests for streaming
skills.returns: HTTP URL for byte-range access to the file

skills.name: sardine_viewer_render_preview
skills.description: Render a SAR scene preview image via the browser viewer
